content:
My name is Andreas Hortlund, 26 year old developer from Sweden My main interest are backend development, devops, security, system design/architecture and language design.
For work i develop a e-commerce websystem in perl and in my spare time i mostly program in go for hobby projects. I am also currently trying to build my own compiler and interpreter from scratch.
Some of my skills include:
